title: Koichi Sakata
text: Koichi Sakata received the B.S., M.S., and Ph.D. degrees in physics, electrical, and computer engineering from Yokohama National University, Yokohama, Japan, in 2006, 2008, and 2011, respectively. He was a Research Student with The University of Tokyo, Tokyo, Japan, from 2010 to 2011. He was also a Research Fellow (DC2) of Japan Society for the Promotion of Science, from 2009 to 2011. Since 2011, he has been with Nikon Corporation, Yokohama, Japan. His research interests include motion control and nano-scale servo control. He works on the design of a motion control and high-precision servo control of large-scale stage. He is a Senior Member of the Institute of Electrical Engineers of Japan.

title: Koichi Sakata
text:
Profile

Career

Aug. 2022 - Present: Control Lecturer and Consultant, Sole Proprietorship, Business Name: SakaLib
Apr. 2011 - Present: Expert Engineer, Nikon Corporation
Apr. 2009 - Mar. 2011: Research Fellow, Japan Society for the Promotion of Science (DC2)
Oct. 2008 - Mar. 2009: COE Research Assistant, Yokohama National University
Apr. 2008 - Sep.2008: Special Research Fellow, Graduate School of Engineering Science, Yokohama National University



Education

Mar. 2011: Ph.D. in Physical Information Engineering, Graduate School of Engineering, Yokohama National University, Japan
Mar. 2008: M.S. in Physical Information Engineering, Graduate School of Engineering, Yokohama National University, Japan
Mar. 2006: B.E. in Electrical and Computer Engineering, Faculty of Engineering, Yokohama National University, Japan



Society

Senior Member: Institute of Electrical Engineers of Japan (IEEJ 電気学会)



Award

電気学会 部門論文賞, Aug. 2020
電気学会 部門活動功労賞, Aug. 2016
電気学会 産業応用部門大会 優秀論文発表賞Ａ, Sep. 2011
計測自動制御学会 学術奨励賞・技術奨励賞, Feb. 2011
電気学会 産業応用部門大会 優秀論文発表賞Ａ, Sep. 2009
